title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE INCREASE AND CONVERSION OF THE DUMARAO MEDICARE COMMUNITY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DUMARAO, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, INTO A TWENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY DISTRICT HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. NO. 10890 / 88 OG No. 21, 3096 (May 25, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7363, April 08, 1992 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE INCREASE AND CONVERSION OF THE DUMARAO MEDICARE COMMUNITY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DUMARAO, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, INTO A TWENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY DISTRICT HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Dumarao Medicare Community Hospital in the Municipality of Dumarao, Province of Capiz, is hereby converted into a district hospital with an authorized bed capacity of twenty-five (25) beds.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be charged against the lump-sum appropriations authorized for the purpose under the current General Appropriations Act. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the operation and maintenance of the hospital shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally

passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 23,

1991 and December 10, 1901, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 8, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
